docket_entries.description: GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REHMET, RACHEL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF., A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-30-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-02-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-10-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-30-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-30-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
